title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 14 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 14 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 14 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 14/03/2022
DCE iron ore futures market falling sharply trends by 6.98%.the main contract closed 759.5. the quotation in the morning was decreased by10 yuan/mt from last Friday. some traders were active to sell, Steel mills buy in small quantities on demand.
